mapper.sql: id, product_id, rule_code, rule_version, rule_name, rule_status, priority, effective_start_time, effective_end_time, candidate_filter_json, match_rule_json, amount_strategy_json, diagnosis_rule_json, payload_schema_version, source_type, source_ref, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM yw_product_rule ORDER BY product_id, rule_version DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
